source_verification_note: Savings ranges (p10/p50/p90) are calibrated from consulting engagements and publicly cited programmes. industry_sources cite real published works.

levers.description: Replace physical KYC with Video KYC and Aadhaar-based e-KYC; digitise loan application and documentation workflows.
industry_sources: RBI Master Direction on KYC 2016 updated 2024 (rbi.org.in) — V-KYC framework enabling full digital onboarding
SEBI CKYC Registry (ckycindia.in) — shared KYC reduces per-customer KYC cost 60-70% vs. physical
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — digital onboarding savings calibrated from 4 India NBFC and fintech mandates

levers.description: Deploy AI-based collections prioritisation, automated IVR and WhatsApp reminders, predictive dialler to reduce cost-per-recovered-rupee.
industry_sources: RBI Report on Trend and Progress of Banking 2023-24 (rbi.org.in) — NBFC collections cost benchmarks and digital collections trends
Bajaj Finance FY25 Annual Report (BSE 500034) — collections technology cited as key efficiency driver; NPA resolution cost reduction
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — collections automation savings from 5 India NBFC collections transformation engagements

levers.description: Grow direct digital channel (app, website, partnerships) share from ~20% to 40%+ of disbursals to reduce DSA and direct sales agent commissions.
industry_sources: RBI NBFC Report 2023-24 — digital channels growing; DSA commission 2-3% of disbursed amount vs. direct channel near-zero
AMFI FY25 (amfiindia.com) — direct plan MF penetration reducing distribution cost by 60-80 bps vs. regular plan
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — channel shift savings from 3 NBFC distribution strategy engagements

levers.lever_name: Credit Bureau & Data API Cost Rationalisation
levers.description: Consolidate credit bureau pulls (CIBIL, Experian, CRIF) with intelligent sequential querying; renegotiate volume-based contracts.
industry_sources: TransUnion CIBIL Annual Report 2024 (cibil.com) — published bureau query pricing structure; volume discounts for 1M+ queries/month
RBI Master Direction on Credit Information Companies 2024 (rbi.org.in) — regulatory framework for bureau usage
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — bureau API cost savings from 4 India NBFC credit decisioning reviews

levers.description: Replace legacy loan management systems with modern cloud-native platforms to reduce maintenance cost, improve automation, and cut per-account processing cost.
industry_sources: Gartner — Financial Services Core Modernisation 2024 (gartner.com) — cloud-native LMS reduces IT maintenance 20-35% vs legacy
Bajaj Finance FY25 Annual Report (BSE 500034) — BFL Tech 2.0 transformation programme: ₹2,500 Cr technology investment cited for long-term cost efficiency
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — core LMS modernisation savings calibrated from 2 NBFC technology transformation mandates

levers.description: Close sub-scale branches (< threshold disbursement/month); convert to digital service points or BC-assisted centres. Reduce facility costs per customer served.
industry_sources: RBI NBFC Report 2023-24 — NBFC branch network expansion analysis; digital channels reducing physical requirement
Bajaj Finance Annual Report FY25 — asset-light model (fewer branches than peer NBFCs) as structural advantage
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — branch rationalisation savings from 3 NBFC network optimisation reviews

levers.description: Aggregate spend across procurement categories (office, travel, professional services); negotiate preferred supplier agreements; implement spend analytics.
industry_sources: Hackett Group G&A Benchmarks 2024 (thehackettgroup.com) — world-class G&A at 1.1% of revenue vs median 1.8%; consolidation saves 20-30%
SEBI LODR compliance requirements — mandate on related-party transactions and procurement transparency for listed entities
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — G&A consolidation savings from 4 NBFC and AMC procurement reviews
